subject: Revert "LU-10556 build: add require libyaml and zlib"

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

This looks like a node configuration issue. You need zlib and yaml libraries to build from the source rpms.

commit.subject: Revert "LU-10556 build: add require libyaml and zlib"
commit.message:
Revert "LU-10556 build: add require libyaml and zlib"

This reverts commit ab3185eb2b54ed2f616022956dca9bd5a849eb80.

Test to see if reverting this patch will fix the issue seen in LU-10858;
SLES12SP3 fails lustre-initialization.

Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=sles12sp3 clientcount=2 mdsdistro=sles12sp3 ossdistro=sles12sp3 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=1 ostcount=7 envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes testgroup=full

Change-Id: I42527492003a3b64488e7f16da098983926d389d
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
